summary: Complete testing of Tenuta Leone website redesign - all features working correctly
passed_tests: All navigation links functional (Home, La Dimora, I Piatti, La Brigata, Contatti)
Tour page shows 13 rooms with 360° badges correctly
Kuula 360° tours embedded and working in Sala detail pages (tested Foyer)
Piatti page filters working (Tutti, I Primi, I Secondi, Il Dolce) - correct counts: 18, 12, 3, 3
Piatti gallery lightbox opens and closes correctly
Brigata page shows 3 chef team members
LazyImage component with IntersectionObserver working (13 lazy images loaded)
WhatsApp button present and functional on all pages with correct phone number
SEO meta tags and structured data (Schema.org) implemented on all pages
Contact form validation working (rejects empty required fields)
